title: AcidIsland - Toxic SkyBlock
description: SkyBlock with a deadly twist: the ocean is acid. Survive on your island, but don't fall in the water.
body:
# ☠️ AcidIsland — SkyBlock, But the Ocean Wants You Dead

Welcome to AcidIsland — where the familiar SkyBlock formula meets a deadly twist. The void is gone. In its place? An endless ocean of acid that damages anything it touches.

Your players spawn on a small island surrounded by corrosive water. Every trip to gather resources, every bridge to a neighboring structure, every misstep carries real consequences. It's SkyBlock for players who want more danger.

## 🎮 What Makes AcidIsland Different from SkyBlock?

- 🌊 **Acid ocean** — the water damages players, mobs, and even items. Configurable damage levels
- ☔ **Acid rain** — optional rain that damages players caught outdoors without shelter
- 🛶 **Boats matter** — travel the acid ocean by boat to find other islands and structures
- 🏗️ **Island in an ocean** — unlike SkyBlock's void, the acid ocean creates a different building dynamic
- 🎯 **Higher stakes** — falling doesn't mean instant death, but the acid makes rescue urgent

## ⚙️ Features

- **Full team system** — invite players, set roles, configure island permissions
- **Configurable acid** — set damage amount, damage type, whether helmets protect, and more
- **Island protection** — dozens of protection flags for PvP, griefing, mob behavior, and more
- **Custom islands** — design your own starting island schematics
- **All BentoBox addons compatible** — challenges, warps, levels, biomes, and 20+ more
- **Free and open source**

## 📦 Installation

Requires **BentoBox** on a **Paper** server.

1. Install [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox)
2. Place `AcidIsland.jar` into `plugins/BentoBox/addons/`
3. Restart — the acid world generates automatically
4. `/ai` to start playing

## 💬 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/ai` | Main player command |
| `/ai team` | Team management |
| `/acid` | Admin commands |

📖 Docs: [docs.bentobox.world](https://docs.bentobox.world) | 💬 Discord: [discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld](https://discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld) | 🐛 Issues: [GitHub](https://github.com/BentoBoxWorld/AcidIsland/issues)
